basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for DEO, Helper and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 16 May 2026 on the official website pgimer.edu.in. A total of 0 vacancies have been announced through the PGIMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 . Candidates up to the age of 30–40 years who have 10th-pass, Graduate, or B Optom qualifications are eligible to apply for these Various Posts vacancies. The walk-in interview for PGIMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is scheduled on 16 May 2026 . Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in interview wit

age_limit.details: Optometrist: Maximum age is 35 years. Data Entry Operator: Maximum age is 40 years. Helper: Maximum age is 30 years.

qualification.details: Optometrist: B Optom, should have own retinoscope and refraction set. Data Entry Operator: Graduate with good computer knowledge and atleast 6 months certification course. Helper: Class 10 pass.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for PGIMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview for the PGIMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026is May 16, 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in the PGIMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The PGIMER Recruitment 2026is for various posts including Optometrist, Data Entry Operator, and Helper. Each post has specific eligibility criteria and age limits.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Helper post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Helper post in the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 is Class 10 pass. This is the basic educational requirement for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Data Entry Operator post in the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 is 40 years. Candidates should ensure they meet this age criterion before attending the interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Optometrist post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Optometrist post in the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 is Rs 15000/- per month. This is a project-based position.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at room 112, Advanced Eye Centre, PGI, Chandigarh. Candidates should report between 10 AM and 1 PM on the interview date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions at PGIMER is project-based. This means the employment is linked to the duration of the specific project.

faq.question: Q10. Do I need to apply online before the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is for a walk-in interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand; they can attend the interview directly on the specified date and time.
